name: Antrich Quant Factory
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; pip3 install --user streamlit; echo '✅ 부품 조립 완료!'

postAttachCommand.server: echo '터미널에서 streamlit run 파일명.py 를 입력하여 실행하세요!'
